# Redis Module (Chinese Source)

> English llms.txt for files under `docs/zh/redis`.

## Docs

- [Module Overview](./index.md): Overview of Redis cache design, reliability, and availability topics.
- [Data Structures](./data-structures.md): Scenario-based selection guide for Redis data structures.
- [Cache Patterns](./cache-patterns.md): Caching patterns and mitigation for common cache risks.
- [Persistence](./persistence.md): RDB and AOF tradeoffs and durability recommendations.
- [High Availability](./high-availability.md): Sentinel and Cluster choices with key operating metrics.
- [Sidebar Metadata](./_meta.json): Navigation metadata for Redis module pages.
- [This LLMs File](./llms.txt): Machine-readable index for this Redis directory.
